title: A Density-Based Algorithm for Discovering Clusters in Large Spatial Databases with Noise
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 DBSCAN 密度聚类方法，用密度可达和噪声点处理支持任意形状簇发现。
why_time_tested_zh: 在高引用深度、较高 breadth proxy 和 KDD Test of Time 记录中同时突出，适合说明算法范式如何长期复用。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为高引用与方法复用案例；工业影响表述需最终报告再补具体应用证据。

title: Snakes: Active Contour Models
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 active contour（snakes）模型，把图像边界检测表述为能量最小化轮廓演化问题。
why_time_tested_zh: citation count 与 recognition lag 都很高，适合说明视觉基础模型经过长期使用后被持续确认。
industry_impact_note_zh: 可讲作视觉分割/轮廓建模的基础案例；具体应用范围需引用论文或综述支撑。

title: Object Recognition from Local Scale-Invariant Features
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出尺度、旋转等变化下稳定的局部特征方法，即后续广泛使用的 SIFT 思路。
why_time_tested_zh: 高 citation count 且为视觉主题代表，适合说明方法组件如何成为领域工具链。
industry_impact_note_zh: 可作为视觉方向代表案例；工业应用表述需另补应用/专利/教材证据。

title: Database replication: a tale of research across communities
Mining Association Rules Between Sets of Items in Large Databases
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出大规模交易数据库中的 association rule mining 问题和高效规则生成思路。
why_time_tested_zh: 数据库方向高引用代表，适合说明从具体数据挖掘任务到通用分析范式的扩散。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为 Database / Systems 和 Citation 模块共同案例。

title: Wake on Wireless: An Event Driven Energy Saving Strategy for Battery Operated Devices
A Look Back and a Look Forward
Network Information Flow
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 network information flow / network coding 框架，说明网络中间节点编码可提升多播传输能力。
why_time_tested_zh: citation、breadth 与 recognition lag 都较高，适合作为理论思想跨网络与信息论扩散的案例。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为理论和网络交叉的代表案例；报告中需注明获奖来源字段来自 seed。

title: Ad-hoc On-Demand Distance Vector Routing
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 AODV 按需路由协议，用于无基础设施移动自组织网络中的路径发现与维护。
why_time_tested_zh: citation count 很高且来自移动网络方向，适合说明网络协议类论文的长期复用。
industry_impact_note_zh: topic 自动标为 HCI 不准确，已在人工标签中改为 Networking。

title: A Database of Human Segmented Natural Images and Its Application to Evaluating Segmentation Algorithms and Measuring Ecological Statistics
Bilateral Filtering for Gray and Color Images
Fast Algorithms for Mining Association Rules in Large Databases
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 提出 Apriori 等快速 association rule mining 算法，推动大规模频繁项集挖掘。
why_time_tested_zh: 高 citation count 且与 SIGMOD 1993 案例形成连续技术线索，适合讲数据挖掘方法成熟。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合与 association-rule problem formulation 作为成对案例。

title: Video Google: A text retrieval approach to object matching in videos
The ALOHA system
Probabilistic Models of Indexing and Searching
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 系统化讨论概率模型在 indexing 与 searching 中的作用，是早期概率 IR 传统的重要代表。
why_time_tested_zh: recognition lag 达 34 年，适合作为“基础思想很晚被重新确认”的长周期案例。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为最长 recognition lag 案例；具体贡献需结合 SIGIR/IR 文献回顾核查。

title: A Unified Architecture for Natural Language Processing: Deep Neural Networks with Multitask Learning
Geodesic Active Contours
Factorization meets the neighborhood: a multifaceted collaborative filtering model
Pervasive Computing: Vision and Challenges
Information Retrieval using a Singular Value Decomposition Model of Latent Semantic Structure
Multitasking without compromise: a virtual machine evolution
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 讨论虚拟机在多任务场景下的演进，强调隔离、资源管理与性能之间的折中。
why_time_tested_zh: 在 breadth proxy 上表现突出，适合作为系统/语言方向长期影响案例，但自动匹配 DOI 曾出现误配，已标注需人工复核。
industry_impact_note_zh: OpenAlex 自动匹配曾误连到无关论文；最终引用前必须以 ACM/OOPSLA 页面复核。

title: Indexing via color histograms
A New Theoretical Framework for Information Retrieval
Concepts and Experiments in Computational Reflection
The Cluster Hypothesis Revisited
Steerable filters for early vision, image analysis, and wavelet decomposition
Flexible Camera Calibration by Viewing a Plane from Unknown Orientations
YAGO: A Core of Semantic Knowledge Unifying WordNet and Wikipedia
Towards Interactive Query Expansion
Automatic Phrase Indexing for Document Retrieval
Beyond independent relevance: methods and evaluation metrics for subtopic retrieval
Graphs over Time: Densification Laws, Shrinking Diameters and Possible Explanations
one_sentence_contribution_zh: 总结大规模真实网络随时间演化的 densification laws 与 shrinking diameters 现象。
why_time_tested_zh: breadth proxy 为 Top 12 最高之一，适合说明长期影响也可体现为跨领域网络分析框架。
industry_impact_note_zh: 适合作为影响广度案例；需避免把 sampled breadth 写成完整引用网络。

Reverend Bayes on Inference Engines: A Distributed Hierarchical Approach
Thumbs up? Sentiment Classification using Machine Learning Techniques

A Sequential Algorithm for Training Text Classifiers
A Metric for Distributions with Applications to Image Databases
BIRCH: An Efficient Data Clustering Method for Very Large Databases
Congestion Control in IP/TCP Internetworks
Adaptive Information Retrieval: Using a Connectionist Representation to Retrieve and Learn about Documents
Chord: A Scalable Peer-to-peer Lookup Service for Internet Applications
A Scalable Content-addressable Network
BLEU: a Method for Automatic Evaluation of Machine Translation
Random Features for Large-Scale Kernel Machines
Self: The power of simplicity
On Power-Law Relationships of the Internet Topology
Improving Round-Trip Time Estimates in Reliable Transport Protocols
Geometric Hashing: A General and Efficient Model-Based Recognition Scheme
Optimizing Search Engines using Clickthrough Data
A Study of the Overlap among Document Representations
The Unified Probabilistic Model for IR
The use of MMR, Diversity-based Reranking for Reordering Documents and Producing Summaries
XORs in the air: practical wireless network coding
Tor: The Second-Generation Onion Router
Scatter/Gather: A Cluster-based approach to Browsing Large Document Collections
Selecting Sequence Numbers,
